'''Mortav''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] that [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Mutanda]]. It was the innermost of the planet's four satellites.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1991-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume One]]'' {{1stm}}
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]'' {{Imo}}
